channel.title: The Verifyco Blog
channel.description: Guides, breakdowns and research on detecting deepfakes, AI-generated and manipulated media — from the team behind Verifyco, on-device forensic verification for iPhone.

item.title: Someone Made a Deepfake of You: What to Do, Step by Step
item.description: Found a deepfake of yourself — a fake video, voice or intimate image? Here's the emergency checklist: evidence, takedowns, platform reporting, legal options and damage control.

item.title: Are Deepfakes Illegal? Deepfake Laws Around the World in 2026
item.description: Is making a deepfake a crime? A plain-language map of deepfake laws in 2026 — the US TAKE IT DOWN Act, the EU AI Act's labelling rules, UK, and what's legal, what isn't.

item.title: How to Tell if a Photo Has Been Edited (7 Checks That Work)
item.description: Not AI — just faked. Learn how to tell if a photo is edited or photoshopped: shadow and edge checks, error level analysis, metadata, reverse search and forensic tools.

item.title: How Accurate Are AI Detectors, Really? (What the Numbers Mean)
item.description: AI detectors claim 99% accuracy — reality is messier. What detection accuracy really means, why false positives happen, what breaks detectors, and how to read a confidence score.

item.title: AI Voice Cloning Scams: How to Protect Yourself in 2026
item.description: Scammers can clone a voice from three seconds of audio. Learn how AI voice cloning scams work, the red flags of a fake voice call, and the habits that actually protect you.

item.title: How to Tell if a Video Is AI-Generated (2026 Guide)
item.description: Sora-class models now make video from a text prompt. Learn how to tell if a video is AI-generated: physics tells, texture artifacts, provenance checks and forensic tools.

item.title: Deepfake Detector Apps: 7 Things to Check Before You Trust One
item.description: Not all deepfake detector apps are equal. Here are the 7 things that separate a trustworthy AI detector from a coin flip — privacy, multi-signal analysis, honesty and more.

item.title: How to Check If a Photo Is Real or AI on Your iPhone (2026)
item.description: Want to verify a photo right on your iPhone without uploading it anywhere? Here's how to check if an image is real or AI-generated, privately and on-device.

item.title: How to Spot a Deepfake Video: 9 Warning Signs for 2026
item.description: Deepfake videos are fooling almost everyone in 2026. Learn the 9 signs that still give them away — plus why your eyes alone aren't enough anymore.

item.title: How to Tell If an Image Is AI-Generated: The Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Can't tell if a photo is real or AI? Learn the 2026 method that actually works: provenance checks, detector tools, and the physics cues AI still gets wrong.

item.title: Content Credentials (C2PA) Explained: The Nutrition Label for Photos
item.description: What are Content Credentials? How C2PA provenance works, how to check a photo's origin, what it can and can't prove — and why it's becoming the web's trust layer.

item.title: How to Spot Fake AI Profile Pictures on Dating Apps & Social Media
item.description: Romance scammers and bot networks run on AI-generated profile photos. Learn the visual tells of a fake profile picture, the reverse-search workflow, and how to verify in seconds.

item.title: What Is a Deepfake? A Plain-English Guide (2026)
item.description: Deepfakes explained simply: what they are, how they're made, why they've become so convincing, the real-world risks, and how to tell a synthetic face or voice from the real thing.

item.title: 5 Signs a Video Has Been Deepfaked (+ How to Check)
item.description: A practical checklist for spotting deepfaked video — the edge artifacts, lip-sync drift, lighting tells, unnatural motion and audio clues that still give synthetic clips away.

item.title: On-Device Verification, Explained (Nothing Leaves Your iPhone)
item.description: Why Verifyco runs entirely on your iPhone: how on-device forensic analysis works, what the Neural Engine does, cloud vs on-device trade-offs, and why nothing is ever uploaded.
